title: Paranoia (Horror)
description: During certain conditions, you become paranoid and your experience becomes... a little less pleasant :) (Also reworks fog rendering)
body:
# Paranoia
Experience a new level of intensity in Minecraft with the Paranoia Mod. This unique modification introduces a gripping paranoia mechanic, significantly altering gameplay under specific conditions. Prepare for a terrifying and unnerving experience as your environment turns hostile and unpredictable.

## Paranoia Conditions
Engage in survival mode and witness paranoia unfold in the Overworld under these conditions
- 🤕 Suffering Injury
- 🍗 Experiencing Hunger
- ☔ Being Outdoors During Rain
- ⚡ Experiencing Thunderstorms
- 🌑 Encountering Darkness
- 🌊 Submerged Underwater
- ⛏️ Exploring Underground
- Note: Paranoia is only activated in the Overworld and in survival mode.

## When Paranoid
Once paranoia sets in, experience these thrilling changes
- 😴 Can't sleep
- 🧟 Mobs stalk you
- 💬 Random messages appear
- 🎵 Strange sounds start to occur
- 💔 Randomly take damage
- 👣 Hear footsteps
- 💥 Hear creepers
- 🍖 Randomly lose all hunger shanks
- 🪣 Randomly drop the item you're holding - watch out near lava!
- 🔨 Randomly hear blocks being broken (Underground only)
- 👻 Randomly hear eerie ambience (Underground only)
- 🌫️ The Fog is closer

## Fog Rework
This mod also reworks fog for a more dynamic experience
- 🌤️ Shorter vision on the surface (10-12 chunks)
- 🏔️ Farther vision when higher up (20+ chunks)
- 🔄 Dynamic fog rendering changes in real-time for increased realism and a bird's-eye view effect

More from Sfinford Development:
Check out my other projects at [Sfinford Development](https://sfinford.github.io)
